title: cheilanthes lanceolata
intro: Cheilanthes lanceolata, also known as lance-leaf rock fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world, including Australia, Asia, and the Americas. The medicinal properties of Cheilanthes lanceolata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health.
